# Pine X Websites

Pine X Websites is an affordable South African website design and lead-generation service by Eduardo "Eddy" Guerra, based in Kleinmond and serving Hermanus, the Overberg and South Africa.

## Main offer
Affordable, high-converting websites for small businesses that need WhatsApp enquiries, calls, quote requests and online sales.

## Starting prices
- Starter One-Page Website: R2,950
- Small Business Website: R5,950
- Lead Website: R8,950
- Shopify Starter Store: R9,950
- Monthly Care: from R450 per month

Payment can often be split 50% deposit and 50% before launch.

## Services
- Affordable website design
- Shopify starter stores
- SEO-ready service pages
- Local SEO landing pages
- WhatsApp lead-generation pages
- Automation-ready websites connected to forms, WhatsApp, email and dashboards

## Contact
Email: eddy@pinexsystems.co.za
Phone / WhatsApp: +27 63 803 5628
